era.zh: 北宋，1088年制小木样，1092年在汴京建成
era.en: Northern Song; wooden model in 1088 and completed at Bianjing in 1092

oneLiner.zh: 把连续水流分成均匀节拍的宇宙机器。
oneLiner.en: A cosmic engine that divides continuous water flow into equal beats.

principle.zh: 天池和平水壶保持稳定水头，水逐壶推动枢轮；天衡擒纵每次只放行一格，再由齿轮系同步带动浑仪、浑象和五层报时木阁。
principle.en: A reservoir and constant-level tank fill the scoops that drive the wheel; the tianheng escapement releases one cell at a time, while the gear train synchronizes the armillary sphere, celestial globe, and five-tier chime pagoda.

sources.quote: 水運儀象臺其制為臺四方而再重，上狹下廣……渾儀置上隔……儀有三重，曰六合儀、曰三辰儀、曰四游儀

translation.zh: 水运仪象台是下宽上窄的方形重台，最上层放置由六合仪、三辰仪和四游仪组成的浑仪。
translation.en: The tower is a square, tiered structure, wider below and narrower above, with a three-part armillary sphere on its upper level.

sources.url: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/新儀象法要_(四庫全書本)/卷下

sources.quote: 樞輪直徑一丈一尺，以七十二輻（一本云九十六）雙植於一轂為三十六洪（一本云四十八），束以三輞，每洪夾持受水壺一，總三十六壺，每壺長一尺、闊五寸、深四寸，於壺側置鐵撥牙以撥天衡關舌

translation.zh: 枢轮直径一丈一尺，辐条成对组成三十六格，每格夹一只受水壶；另有版本记作四十八格。每壶长一尺、宽五寸、深四寸，侧面铁拨牙推动天衡关舌。
translation.en: The 1-zhang-1-chi wheel has paired spokes forming 36 cells, each holding a scoop; another edition gives 48. Each scoop is 1 chi long, 5 cun wide, and 4 cun deep, with an iron tooth that moves the escapement tongue.

sources.url: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/新儀象法要_(四庫全書本)/卷下

sources.quote: 天衡一置樞輪上，天關一置衡腦，天權一置衡尾，天條一在衡之前，天衡關舌一以天條綴之……樞衡一在天衡關舌上，衡腦為格叉以抵受水壺，以樞權掛其末，所以節受水壺之升降也。左右天鎖二，分置東西天柱間梁上，所以持正樞輪也

translation.zh: 天衡、天关、天权、天条和关舌组成控制机构；格叉托住水壶，配重调节升降，左右天锁从两边固定枢轮。
translation.en: The tianheng, gate, counterweight, strip, and tongue form the control mechanism; a fork supports each scoop, the weight regulates its rise and fall, and two locks hold the wheel from either side.

sources.url: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/新儀象法要_(四庫全書本)/卷下

sources.quote: （受水）壺虛即為格叉所格……水實即格叉不能勝壺，故格叉落，格叉落即壺側鐵撥擊（開關舌）……一輻過則左天鎖及天關開……一壺落則關鎖再拒次壺；激輪右回，故以右天鎖拒之使不能西也

translation.zh: 空壶被格叉托住；水满后格叉下落，铁拨牙打开关舌。轮子走过一格后锁和关重新挡住下一壶，右锁阻止倒转。
translation.en: An empty scoop rests on the fork; when full it overcomes the fork and its iron tooth opens the tongue. After one cell passes, the locks catch the next scoop, while the right lock prevents reverse motion.

sources.url: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/新儀象法要_(四庫全書本)/卷下

sources.quote: 木閣五層……第一層時初木人左搖鈴，刻至中擊鼓，時正右扣鐘……第五層分布木人出報夜漏箭……晝夜機輪八重，第一重曰天輪以撥渾象之赤道牙……

translation.zh: 五层木阁用木人按时摇铃、击鼓、扣钟并报告夜漏；八重昼夜机轮中，天轮推动浑象赤道齿。
translation.en: Figures in the five-tier wooden pagoda ring bells, beat a drum, strike a chime, and report the night watches; the first of eight day-and-night wheels drives the celestial globe's equatorial teeth.

sources.url: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/新儀象法要_(四庫全書本)/卷下

sources.quote: 樞輪左設天池、平水壺。平水壺受天池水注入受水壺以激樞輪；受水壺水落入退水壺……以昇水下輪運水入昇水上壺……運水入天河，天河復流入天池，周而復始

translation.zh: 天池把水送入平水壶，再流进受水壶推动枢轮；落水经退水壶和提水轮送回天河，最后回到天池循环。
translation.en: Water passes from the reservoir through the constant-level tank into the scoops, drives the wheel, then returns through the drain and lifting wheels to the celestial river and reservoir in a cycle.

sources.url: https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/新儀象法要_(四庫全書本)/卷下

dimensions.basis: 流传说法，四库本卷三未明载
流传说法，四库本卷三未明载

summary.zh: 三十六只刚性固定受水壶。

evidence.zh: 按《新仪象法要》的三十六壶记载复原，国家博物馆藏有1:5模型。
evidence.en: Reconstructs the text's 36 scoops; a 1:5 model is held by the National Museum of China.

critique.zh: 固定壶的计时稳定性不如铰接翻斗方案。
critique.en: Rigid scoops may keep time less steadily than hinged tipping scoops.

summary.zh: 受水壶采用可倾翻的铰接结构。
summary.en: The scoops are hinged so they can tip.

evidence.zh: 工作模型显示铰接翻斗计时更稳定；土屋荣夫和诹访湖时之科学馆复原同属这一体系。
evidence.en: Working models showed steadier timekeeping; Tsuchiya Sakao's variant and the Gishodo replica belong to this family.

detail.zh: 正文记三十六壶，异本记四十八壶，两个数字都必须保留。
detail.en: The main reading gives 36 scoops while another edition gives 48; both readings must remain visible.

detail.zh: 约12米高、约7米宽是流传说法，《四库全书》本卷三没有明载，因此只作推测。
detail.en: The roughly 12-meter height and 7-meter base are received figures not explicit in volume three of the Siku edition, so they remain inferred.

topic.en: Completion date of the Taichung replica

detail.zh: 台中1:1木制复原的完成年有1993年与1997年两种说法。
detail.en: The completion year of the Taichung 1:1 wooden replica is disputed between 1993 and 1997.

exhibit.en: Reconstruction in the Light of China gallery

name.zh: 诹访湖时之科学馆仪象堂

exhibit.zh: 苏颂与水运仪象台展陈
exhibit.en: Exhibit on Su Song and the clock tower

hook.zh: 把连续水流数字化为均匀节拍：受水壶与格叉组成自调节的负反馈调速器。
hook.en: Digitizing continuous water flow into equal beats: the scoops and fork form a self-regulating negative-feedback governor.

demo.zh: 慢放一个擒纵周期：壶注水、格叉下落、关舌开启、轮进一格、天锁复位，并逐句同步原文。
demo.en: Play one escapement cycle in slow motion—fill, yield, open, advance one cell, re-lock—with captions synchronized to the source.

echo.zh: 每一只机械表里的擒纵器，都是这声“滴答”的后代。
echo.en: The escapement in every mechanical watch descends from this tick-tock.
